## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Scope

- [ ] Plan/feature/add-on behavior
- [ ] Entitlement resolution
- [ ] Usage tracking or corrections
- [ ] Trials
- [ ] Rule engine
- [ ] Billing adapter boundary
- [ ] Admin UI
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests only

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept billing, tax, invoices, checkout, refunds, and accounting out of scope.
- [ ] I did not assume the subject is always `User`.
- [ ] I added or updated tests.
- [ ] I updated documentation for public API changes.
- [ ] `composer test` passes.
- [ ] `composer format:test` passes.

## Notes For Reviewers

Mention migration impact, backwards compatibility, or follow-up work.
